ValidationRule.description: Tenure months will depend on the Loan product
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Loan_Product__c, "Gold"), Tenure_Months__c >24), AND(ISPICKVAL(Loan_Product__c, "Home"), Tenure_Months__c < 60)
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Tenure is not valid for the selected Loan Product.
